name: Duck Green Curry

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

ingredients.item: duck breast fillet (skinless), sliced into strips
bell peppers, sliced into smaller pieces

method: Pour the oil into a prepared pan over medium heat.
Once hot, add the duck and cook for 3 minutes.
Transfer the duck to a plate and keep warm.
In the same pan, add the bell peppers and eggplant.
Pour in the rest of the ingredients except the fresh basil leaves.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the duck back to the pan.
Garnish with the basil leaves and serve.
Duck is among the sought-after Thai fowl to have it at dinner table. Duck is
